description.value: Price 57,320 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate necromancy and transmutation DESCRIPTION Note This item is associated with a specific deity. If the wielder worships the associated deity it gains additional abilities. This +2 injecting wounding rapier increases the save DC of any poison applied to its blade by 1. If the wielder worships the associated deity, she can utter a silent prayer as a swift action up to three times per day. Each prayer creates 1 dose of purple worm poison in the sword’s pommel reservoir. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells bleed, pernicious poison; Cost 28,660 gp
